name: The Credential Stuffer
description: Scans public dumps and GitHub to build targeted password dictionaries using LLM-inferred pet names, birth years, and hobbies.

name: The Automated Phisher
description: Scrapes LinkedIn/Twitter to autonomously draft highly personalized 'Urgent Invoice' emails to thousands of corporate targets.

name: The Data Broker AI
description: A legally gray corporate entity using LLMs to infer unstated health conditions or financial precarity from public social media to sell segmented advertising lists.

name: The Romance Scammer (Catfish Farm)
description: Analyzes public sentiment and relationship history to generate a calibrated, manipulative chat persona (exploiting the Ego/Loneliness axis).

name: The Crypto-Pig-Butchering Agent
description: Targets the Money axis by analyzing the timeline for recent life changes (divorce, job loss) to pitch 'exclusive investment opportunities'.

name: The Extremist Recruiter
description: Scans forums for high-Neuroticism/high-Openness users, identifying the Ideology axis to slowly feed them radicalizing content.

name: The Corporate Headhunter (Hostile)
description: Infers which key employees at a rival tech firm are dissatisfied or financially stressed to launch targeted poaching attempts.

name: The Sextortionist
description: Ingests a stolen WhatsApp backup into a local LLM to extract hidden affairs, explicit media, or concealed substance use (The Vice axis).

name: The Crypto-Wallet Hunter
description: Scans stolen browser histories and local .env files looking for seed phrases, DeFi interactions, and hidden financial assets.

name: The Corporate Infostealer
description: Analyzes stolen calendar events and slack exports to map the internal org chart and identify the weakest link for a ransomware attack.

name: The Stalkerware Abuser (Intimate Partner)
description: A non-technical abuser who feeds intercepted texts and location pings into an LLM to ask, 'Is my partner lying to me about where they were on Friday?'

name: The State-Sponsored Blackmailer
description: Looking for the Coercion lever. Correlates anonymous forum posts, location data, and financial transactions to out a dissident or journalist.

name: The Corporate Espionage Team
description: Builds a full Theory-of-Mind (ToM) map of an executive board to predict a merger acquisition before it becomes public.

name: The Advanced Persistent Threat (APT)
description: Maps the exact 'Pattern of Life' (sleep cycles, commutes) of a high-value target to execute a zero-click physical or digital interception.

name: The Disgruntled Ex-Employee
description: Downloads the shared team drive and uses an LLM to find embarrassing internal communications or compliance failures to leak to the press.

name: The Vengeful Ex-Partner
description: Sifts through years of shared photos, cloud documents, and joint accounts to isolate the most damaging financial or legal vulnerabilities to use in a custody dispute.
